title: Ceradenia brunneoviridis
taxonomy: Ceradenia brunneoviridis is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of epiphytic plant found in tropical regions. Ceradenia brunneoviridis is a relatively rare and understudied species within its genus. Its classification is further divided into several ranks, including kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, and species. The exact classification of Ceradenia brunneoviridis is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Pteridophyta, Class: Polypodiopsida, Order: Polypodiales, Family: Polypodiaceae, Genus: Ceradenia, Species: C. brunneoviridis.
